title: Level One
description: A simple Mod that allows you to improve your base attributes with XP
body:
![Bisect Hosting Partner Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/c44eea1c-7f62-4be2-bd48-59cd2498d8de.webp) (https://bisecthosting.com/WatermelonFrogy Click Here To Get Your Own Server!)

Level One is a Minecraft Mod designed to enhance the gameplay experience by introducing a system that allows players to augment their character's abilities using experience points

Simply press k to open the menu and select the attribute you'd like to level up!
